use proptest::prelude::*;

fn valid_config_strategy() -> impl Strategy<Value = AppConfig> {
    (1025u16..65535, "[a-z]{3,20}", 1u32..10000, 1u64..3599)
        .prop_map(|(port, hostname, max_connections, timeout_secs)| {
            AppConfig {
                port,
                hostname,
                max_connections,
                timeout_secs,
            }
        })
}

proptest! {
    // GOOD: strategy generates valid values directly
    #[test]
    fn test_config_parsing(config in valid_config_strategy()) {
        let serialized = serde_json::to_string(&config).unwrap();
        let parsed: AppConfig = serde_json::from_str(&serialized).unwrap();
        prop_assert_eq!(config, parsed);
    }
}
